summary: Frontend-only Phase-3 verification PASSED 100%. Validated QuoteEstimator math/interactions (default $125–$155, miles recalc, mode swap miles<->hours, hourly default $235–$295, vehicle change Escalade ESV hourly = $375–$465, Reserve button navigates to /contact), logo image rendering in navbar and footer (naturalWidth=300, complete=true, points to s8yy86mt_1000037151.png), static SEO files (/robots.txt 200 with our 'Disallow: /admin' + 'Sitemap: https://92limo.com/sitemap.xml' appended after Cloudflare-managed block; /sitemap.xml 200 valid XML listing all 10 page URLs), and booking-form regression on /contact submitting successfully with sonner success toast 'Inquiry received! Our team will contact you shortly.'
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteEstimator.jsx: hourly mode silently clamps user input to 2hr minimum (Math.max(2, ...)) — recalculates from 2 even when user types 1 — UI does not visually warn the user; minor UX polish, not a blocker.

No DELETE endpoint exposed for admin bookings (DELETE /api/admin/bookings/{id} returned 405). Test seed cleanup is therefore manual. Consider adding admin DELETE for test data hygiene; not required for MVP.

robots.txt directives are appended AFTER Cloudflare-managed managed block — works correctly for crawlers per spec (last matching User-agent block wins for a given UA), but worth confirming intended behaviour for /admin disallow precedence with custom managed bots.
test_credentials: /app/memory/test_credentials.md (admin password: 92Limo!Admin2026) — used only for cleanup attempt.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 booking with UI_TEST prefix (name='UI_TEST Booking Regression', email='ui_test_regression@example.com') during regression. Attempted cleanup via DELETE /api/admin/bookings/{id} returned 405 (no delete endpoint). Seed remains in DB and is identifiable by UI_TEST prefix; main agent may purge manually.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase-3 additions verified. Estimator math matches RATES table in QuoteEstimator.jsx. Logo image (300x?) loads from emergent customer-assets CDN. robots.txt is served by preview ingress with Cloudflare-managed prefix then our appended directives — verify with curl tail. Booking POST -> /api/bookings still emits sonner success toast. For Radix Select fields inside booking-form, prefer `select_option` on the hidden native <select> duplicates (found via querySelectorAll('[data-testid=booking-form] select')) — much more reliable than role=option clicks.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no defects found in this iteration.
